prompt: Create a dramatic vertical dark-fantasy poster in a Minecraft-inspired voxel style, like an epic movie or game cover. At the very top, place a large ornate metallic-gold blackletter title reading {argument name="headline text" default="[Heliocore.C6]"}, with a smaller elegant serif subtitle beneath it reading {argument name="subtitle" default="The Final Convergence"}. The main scene shows 1 massive Ender Dragon made of black cubic blocks, flying forward and downward out of the sky with its wings spread wide, mouth open, glowing purple eyes, and violet energy in its throat, while chunks of voxel debris break apart around its body. Behind the dragon, place 3 large concentric glowing magic circles with arcane runes and geometric symbols in pale gold light, centered in the sky like a summoning seal. In the foreground, show 1 blocky hero seen from behind, resembling Steve, standing on a ruined stone staircase-throne and raising 1 glowing purple enchanted sword toward the dragon. Surround the platform with 4 visible Endermen total, tall and slender with black blocky bodies and glowing purple eyes, acting as ominous witnesses. The environment is an enormous ruined End-city style abyss with towering broken pillars, floating block fragments, crystal clusters, and distant structures fading into purple fog. Use a palette of black, charcoal, deep violet, magenta glow, and antique gold highlights, with cinematic volumetric lighting, heavy atmosphere, sparks, dust, magical particles, extreme scale, high contrast, and a polished ultra-detailed poster composition.
translatedPrompt: 创作一张具有 Minecraft 风格体素艺术的戏剧性竖版暗黑奇幻海报，呈现出史诗电影或游戏封面的质感。在海报最上方，放置一个巨大的华丽金属金黑体标题，内容为 {argument name="headline text" default="[Heliocore.C6]"}，下方配以较小的优雅衬线字体副标题 {argument name="subtitle" default="The Final Convergence"}。主场景展示 1 条由黑色立方体构成的巨型末影龙，正张开双翼从天空中俯冲而下，龙口大张，双眼闪烁着紫光，喉咙处汇聚着紫色能量，身体周围散落着破碎的体素残骸。在龙的身后，天空中悬浮着 3 个巨大的同心发光魔法阵，阵中刻有奥术符文和几何符号，如同召唤封印一般。前景中，展示 1 位背对镜头的方块英雄（类似 Steve），站在废墟般的石阶王座上，向巨龙举起 1 把发着紫光的附魔剑。平台周围环绕着总共 4 个末影人，它们身形高挑纤细，拥有黑色的方块身体和发光的紫色眼睛，作为不祥的见证者。环境设定为一个巨大的末影城风格深渊，布满了高耸的断壁残垣、漂浮的方块碎片、水晶簇，以及隐没在紫色雾气中的远方建筑。色调采用黑色、炭灰色、深紫色、品红色辉光以及古金色高光，并运用电影级的体积光、厚重的氛围感、火花、尘埃、魔法粒子，展现出极具张力的尺度感、高对比度以及精致且超细节的海报构图。

breakdown.creativeCore: Minecraft 末影龙奇幻海报：一张电影感十足的 Minecraft 风格暗黑奇幻海报，描绘了一位孤胆英雄直面巨型末影龙的场景，非常适合用作游戏封面艺术、活动主视觉图或史诗级宣传海报。
breakdown.subject: 界面
breakdown.bestUse: 电影海报、音乐封面、书籍封面、播客封面

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: centered, vertical]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: cinematic, fantasy]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: volumetric, high contrast]。

Text requirements:
包含文字或排版元素。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
